title: [藍波] 其實 Boston Celtics 係咪應該叫 波士頓些路迪 先岩 ????

replies.msg: 明明蘇超 Celtic 係叫些路迪, 點解 Boston Celtics 會變咗做 波士頓蔡爾凸人

I'm a Boston Celtics fan. Channel one gives its games detailed coverage. Boston Celtics' game against Los Angeles Lakers received in-depth press coverage. Its game against Phoenix Suns was also given wide coverage in the media. It tends to get lots of magazine and televisikn coverahe because its matches are exciting to watch. Next weekend, the organization will be holding a chairmanship election. Channel five will be providing live coverage of the election. If ypu wanna check out the reports of Boston Celtics' final game over the past decade, the NBA monthly mazagines offer extensive coverage of them. If ypu wanna watcg the highlights of Boston Celtics's final matches in the last ten years, channel two gives those highlights extensive coverage. The book "NBA playoff games" offers extensive coverage of three-point shooting techniques. Japan Mobile 📱now has nationwide coverage with its network which easily outshines other service providers. Its coverage used to be poor in Fukuoka which affected how people could access the internet but these days, it's regarded as one of the best. Its coverage is fantastic throughout Japan.
